name: Fort Monroe Community Center
description: Fort Monroe Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hampton, VA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: FortMonroe Outdoor Courts
description: FortMonroe Outdoor Courts is a place to play pickleball in Hampton, VA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Fox Hill Neighborhood Center
description: Open recreation play. Follows USA Pickleball rules and courtesy protocols.

name: Hampton Family YMCA
description: Hampton Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Hampton, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, youth programming, lights, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Langley AFB
description: Langley AFB is a place to play pickleball in Hampton, VA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.

name: Southall Landings Marina
description: Come play pickleball at Southall Landings Marina in Hampton, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water.
